title: Closing SOP — FOH
items: ENSURE everything*** is topped up (refer to checklist)
Fruit preparation
CLEAN toilet (refer to toilet checklist)
Outdoor area: PUT umbrellas down, WIPE DOWN all tables, CLEAN gap between decking & windows
MOVE flowers & napkin dispenser to middle island.
WIPE DOWN all tables(1st), chairs(2nd) and seat benches (last).
PUT AWAY all coffee and milkshake milks back into fridges.
PUT pastries and banana bread away.
CLEAN benches (sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel): Counter bench: Third party tablets area & pastries area: Tap water area: 2x fridges doors & tea's bench area.
SWEEP floor including underneath fridges & under sink area.
Water bottles: WASH & RINSE.
CLEAN Coffee station, froth machine & behind coffee machine. (sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel).
Coffee fibre clothes: WASH old coffee fibre cloths & DRY them above coffee machine and SOAK TODAY'S ones with bleach.
CLEAN and EMPTY Coffee knocking tube.
Freezer area: CLEAN milkshake toppings shelf, syrup shelf and top fridge three sliding door (sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel).
CLEAN Milkshake station & juicer station: (sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel).
9PM or 10 PM WASH juicer, clean milk shaker & blender (sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel).
Sink area: REMOVE all dirty dishes tubs to kitchen & clean sink area sponge & soap, spray & dry with paper towel).
Bins: EMPTY both bins and RINSE them at mop sink
Dirty tables: WIPE DOWN any USED tables, chairs and seating benches.
Chairs: FLIP up all chairs 15mins before closing time 8:45pm/9:45pm.
SWEEP whole restaurant & bar (including underneath fridges & under sink area).
MOP whole restaurant & bar.
Outdoor furniture: BRING in A-frame boards, outdoor long bench, stool, FRONT RIGHT table & chairs.
Overhead menu boards: PUSH BACK.
CHARGE coffee scale!!!!!
CHARGE ALL tablets!!!!
CHECK any unpaid & deliveries.
CHECK all coffee and milkshake milks are in fridge.
TURN OFF grinders, music, light, DISPLAY cabinet light.
TURN OFF both heaters OR coolers: behind counter & floor!!!!
LOCK DOOR!!!!
